title: Reduced Particles
description: A pvp themed particle texturepack that reduces the particles
body:
Ever had a texturepack that had wayyy to many particles but couldn't find a pvp texturepack that doesn't mess up your other texturepacks?  Well look no further!  This texturepack reduces the particles BUT does not replace any other textures!  So you can use your favorite texturepack AND have reduced particles!  

This pack:

- Removes Explosion Particles.
- Reduces Glitter Particles.
- Reduces Potion Effect Particles.
- Reduces Generic Particles.

Enjoy!
